title: Create column from template with API
excerpt: Is it possible to use the API to add a templatized column to a board?

posts.author: mcdemon (M.McD)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to use the API to add a templatized column to a board?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @mcdemon,

What would a “templatized column” be? A column of a specific type with specific options in it (such as a status column with specific labels to it)?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: mcdemon (M.McD)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes. I have several status columns with multiple labels which have been saved as column templates. Is there an API call to add a column from the saved column template? If not, do you have an example of a query constructing them from scratch?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Support

Column templates

2 min read Feature   Do you have multiple workflows that could benefit from using similar column structures? Have you customized a Status Column, for example, with many unique labels which you'...

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @mcdemon,

What Cody showed is a possible way to solve this but it does not involve the API as your title suggests.

Via API you can create a script to create the column and after that, to add any data you need to it.

Cheers,
Matias
